headline: Texas Pacific Land Corporation (TPL) Boosts the Quarterly Dividend 12.5% to 60c Per Share
summary: Texas Pacific Land Corporation (NYSE:TPL) is among the 12 Best Performing Stocks in February. On February 10, 2026, the board of Texas Pacific Land Corporation (NYSE:TPL) announced a quarterly cash dividend of $0.60 per share, up 12.5% from the previous quarter. The dividend will be paid to shareholders of record on March 16, 2026, at […]

headline: Texas Pacific Land Dividend Hike Highlights AI And Water Growth Tradeoff
summary: Texas Pacific Land Corporation (NYSE:TPL) announced a 12.5% increase in its quarterly dividend. The company reported strong quarterly results, with substantial revenue contributions from its water and land segments. Management highlighted accelerating investment activity tied to AI data center infrastructure on its land and resource footprint. For investors watching Texas Pacific Land at a share price of $539.79, the 12.5% dividend increase adds an additional income angle to a stock that...
